# IFTM University Moradabad
# https://iftmuniversity.ac.in

> IFTM University is a NAAC 'A' Grade accredited private university in Moradabad, Uttar Pradesh, India. Established in 2001, offering 130+ programmes across Engineering, Pharmacy, Management, Law, Sciences, and more.

## Key Information
- Location: Lodhipur Rajput, Delhi Road, Moradabad, UP - 244102
- Phone: +91-9639004077
- Toll Free: 1800-121-066666
- Email: info@iftm.ac.in
- NAAC Grade: A
- UGC Recognized: Yes
- AICTE Approved: Yes
- PCI Approved: Yes
- BCI Approved: Yes
- Programmes: 130+ (UG, PG, Diploma, Ph.D.)
- Placement Rate: 90%+
- Campus: 69+ acres
- Founded: 2001

## Schools & Programmes

### School of Engineering & Technology
- B.Tech (Computer Science, AI, Civil, Mechanical, Electrical, Electronics, Biotechnology, Agriculture)
- M.Tech (Various specializations)
- Diploma (Civil, Computer Science, Electronics, Electrical, Mechanical, AI)

### School of Pharmaceutical Sciences
- B.Pharm (4 years)
- M.Pharm (Pharmaceutics, Pharmaceutical Chemistry, Pharmacology, Pharmacognosy)
- D.Pharm (2 years)

### School of Business Management
- BBA (Hons. with Research)
- MBA
- B.Com (Hons. with Research)
- M.Com
- Bachelor of Hotel Management

### School of Computer Science & Applications
- BCA (Hons. with Research)
- MCA
- B.Sc Computer Science

### School of Law
- LL.B
- Integrated Law (BBA LL.B, BA LL.B)
- LLM

### School of Sciences
- B.Sc (Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, Botany, Zoology, Home Science)
- M.Sc (Various specializations)

### School of Biotechnology
- B.Sc Biotechnology
- M.Sc Biotechnology

### School of Education & Humanities
- B.Ed, M.Ed
- BA (Various subjects)
- MA (Education, English, Hindi, Economics, Geography, Sociology, Journalism)

### School of Agricultural Sciences
- B.Sc Agriculture
- M.Sc (Agronomy, Horticulture, Genetics & Plant Breeding)

## Admissions
- Website: https://iftmuniversity.ac.in/admissions
- Apply Online: https://uni.edulip.com/UI/Website/IFTM/StudentRegistration.php
- Session: 2026-27
- Eligibility: 45% aggregate (40% for SC/ST) in 10+2
- Application Fee: ₹5,000

## Key Highlights
- NAAC 'A' Grade Accreditation
- UGC Recognized
- 90%+ Placement Rate
- 400+ Recruiting Partners
- 69+ Acre Campus
- Industry-Academia Collaboration
- Research Excellence
